titleStmt.title: SII 34.352: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 352. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the rock-cut cave in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Parākrama-pāṇḍya, 9th year, Āvaṇi, Kanyā, badi, Saturday, 11, Punarvasu = A.D. 1323, August 27, Saturday.

This records a sale of land to Vyāpakaśiva, a disciple of the Naḍuvil-maḍam at Tiruvāṉaikkā and of the Lakshādhyāya lineage, by Aṅgarāyaṉ a uḍaiyāṉ of Perumbuliyūr, in Teṉmalai-nāḍu a sub-division of Vaḍa-Paṉaṅgaḍu-nāḍu in Jayasingākulakāla-vaḷanāḍu. The sale price was 100 varāhaṉ paṇam, that was then in currency. The annual kaḍamai on the land was fixed at 100 paṇam and the āyam at 15 paṇam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrīmatkīttikku mEl kOccaṭapaṉmarā
natiribhuvana cakravattikaḷ śrīparākrama pāṇḍyadevar
kku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu Āvaṇimātattu nāḷ kaṉṉināyaṟṟu
Aparapakṣattu ceṉikkiḻamaiyum Ekādaśiyum peṟṟa
puṇarpūcattu nāḷ lakṣāddhyāyar santānattu tiruvāṉaikkā
tiruppatiyil naṭuvil maṭattu mutaliyār śiṣyakaḷil vi
yāpakaśivarkku ceyaciṅka kulakālavaḷanāṭṭu vaṭapaṉa
ṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu teṉmalaināṭṭu perumpuliyūrar perumpuliyūr perum
puliyūr Uṭaiyāṉ perivaṉ Araṅkuḷavaṉāṉa Aṅkarāyaṉē vilai
pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṟṟai nāḷil Ivaṟku viṟpatāka I
caintu viṟkiṟa Eṉkāṇi Āṉa Aṅkarāyar kuṭikkāṭṭukkum kuḷattukkum Icai
nta peru nāṉkellai Āvatu kīḻpāṟkellai mullaiyarāyaṉ Apputtuṟai
kku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ākkaivayalil peru
varampukku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai nāvicaṉ puṉce
yil mēl karuvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Aṅkarāya
r kuḷattu nīr mēnta Ellaikku teṟkum Āka Icainta
perunāṉ kellaikkuḷḷu tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tēvatāṉa
māka nāvalūr nāṭāḻvāṉ kāṇi Āka viṭṭa nilam taṭi Iraṇṭum vattāṇṭār ma
kkaḷ kāṇiāy viṭṭa nāṟṟaṅkāl taṭiyum Āka taṭimūṉṟukkum nīkki
Uḷḷa nilaṅkaḷukkum kuḷattukkum Aṉṟāṭu naṟkāciṉāl varākaṉ paṇa
m nūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariyē kāṭṭi Ēṟṟi vi
laikku viṟṟu vilaipporuḷ kaippaṟṟi vilai
Āvaṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttēṉ viyāpaka civaṟku A
ṅkarāyaṉēṉ Ikkuṭikkāṭṭukku Āṇṭu Oṉṟu
kku nūṟu paṇamum Āyam paṇam paṇamu
patiṉaiñcum Iṟukkavum mēl vantatu Ēkapōka
mākavum Ikkaṭamai paṇattilē nāvalūr nāṭāḻ
vāṉ nālupaṇam Iṟukkavum Ippaṭikku Ituvē
cātaṉamāvatākavum pāṭikāval vēṇṭinā
rukku kuṭukkavum Ippaṭikku Inta Aṅkarāyaṉ co
lla Ipramāṇam Eḻutiṉēṉ Iṉṉāṭṭu kaṇa
kku nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ mutali paṉaṅkāṭṭu vēḷā
ṉ Eḻuttu mātava paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu veḷḷaivāraṇa
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu paṉaṅkāṭṭup piccar taṟkuṟiyu
m poṟkōyil mārāyaṟ taṟkuṟiyum Iṭṭu pūtama
ṅkalamuṭaiyānacciṉārkku Iṉiyāṉ taṟku
ṟiyum Iṭṭu Utaiyaṉ tamiḻataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.352 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
